positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a majestic mountain range at dawn, viewed through a thick veil of mist. The composition should feature strong, clean silhouettes of jagged peaks against a gradient sky of deep indigo, soft lavender, and pale gold. Include abstract elements like crescent moons and stylized celestial bodies (e.g., nebulas or rings) subtly integrated into the sky. Use a limited, harmonious color palette (indigo, lavender, gold, black). The style must be highly graphic, vectorized, and suitable for screen printing on apparel, emphasizing bold lines, high contrast, and excellent readability. Centralized, symmetrical composition. Dreamy, yet crisp and clean.
negative: photorealistic, photograph, blurry, text, logo, signature, watermark, low detail, noise, bad anatomy, artifact, ugly, extra limbs, cartoon, painting, messy, grain
